title: microsorum commutatum
intro: Microsorum commutatum, also known as the Java fern, is a species of aquatic fern native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Java fern include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Java fern is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
